questions.text: Who is the author of the chapter 'The Gift of Words'?
questions.explanation: Ruskin Bond is a renowned Indian author known for his simple and engaging writing style, especially for children.

questions.text: The protagonist in the story loved reading books.
questions.explanation: The story emphasizes the importance of reading and how books can be a source of joy and knowledge.

questions.text: What is the main message of the chapter?
questions.correctAnswer: The chapter emphasizes the power of words and education to transform lives.
questions.explanation: The story highlights how learning and literacy can empower individuals and open new opportunities in life.

questions.text: The word 'generous' means willing to give and ________.
questions.explanation: Generous means showing a readiness to give more of something, especially money or time, than is strictly necessary or expected.
